title: Short-term memory enhancement
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{ForcePower
|image=
|name=Short-term memory enhancement
|alternate=
|alignment=Either side of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]
|area=[[Force power/Legends#Control|Control]]<ref name="DFRSP">''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]''</ref>

'''Short-term memory enhancement''' was a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Force power/Legends|ability]] that allowed an individual to 'replay' a recent memory with hyperaccuracy, recalling a particular detail that was previously observed but not consciously remembered. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was taught this power by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]].<ref name="DFRSP" /> The ancient [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]-turned [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Freedon Nadd]] also possessed this ability. So was former [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] of [[Lost Tribe of Sith]] [[Vestara Khai]] when using this technique recalled [[Allana Djo Solo|Allana Solo]]'s face details.
